name: Flash Beat
taskBlurb: Flash Beat is an up-and-coming musician influencer on BurrowBeats. He often uses shared tracks to **shape his image** and **chase opportunities**. Pick **3** songs from his listening history for his **Public Playlist**.

assignment.title: Assignment: Build the Hype
body: Flash Beat is an emerging music influencer on BurrowBeats.
He wants a public playlist that feels exciting, stylish, and impossible to ignore.
Read his clues and explore his listening history. Choose 3 songs he would feature to attract attention and shape his image.

stories.text: He remembers the first time he spoke into a microphone. His voice trembled—but the music didn't.

• on stage, he watches the crowd.
• off stage, he needs them to watch him.
Grew up playing 8bit console games like 'Super Clysdale Brothers' and 'Mega Mammoth,' and those chirping, buzzing, energetic soundtracks inspired him to want to make music of his own.
He had a song he couldn't stop replaying after the breakup. It understood what he couldn't say out loud.
As a teenager, he spent hours turning the distortion knob all the way up, chasing the loudest, most overwhelming sound he could create. That was the first time he felt what music could do to a body.
When he found his first synthesizer, he realized he didn't just want to play music—he wanted to build it.

listeningHistory.title: Pocket Galaxy (8-Bit Dream)
listeningHistory.description: Nostalgic 8-bit tones building a tiny pocket universe.
listeningHistory.lyricsFragment:
tiny stars
inside a pocket screen

assignment.title: Assignment: Curate the Vibe
body: Soft Frame sees music as part of her aesthetic world.
Read her clues and listening history, then select 3 songs that best match the image she wants others to see.

stories.text:
She still remembers the first musical that made her feel powerful in the dark.
Since then, she has loved songs that feel larger than life.

As a visual arts student, she rarely looks at an album as sound alone.
She studies the colors, typography, and composition,
searching for clues about the world the music wants to create.

She began carrying a camera because she was afraid ordinary moments would disappear too quickly.
Over time, she learned to frame them carefully,
turning everyday life into something worth keeping.

At concerts, she lifts her lightstick with thousands of others,
feeling herself become part of something larger than her own voice.

assignment.title: Assignment: A Softer Introduction
body: Marshmallow wants to share music that feels personal, but not too revealing.
Look through her clues and private listening history. Choose 3 songs she would feel comfortable placing in her public playlist.

stories.text:
In her spare time, she knits small sweaters from her own wool.
It is her quiet way of turning softness into something that can last.

On rainy days, she disappears into her pillow,
letting soft dreams and slower thoughts carry her somewhere gentler.

Her ride home is long. On the train, she listens quietly,
saving her softer songs for the window, and faster ones for the days she needs a little lift.

She does not always trust fortune tellers,
but she has learned that the heart often notices what the mind has yet to name.
